msg: Ambient main red from the green-batch: WI-885 (billing-subscription-store-teardown.ts) merged BEFORE WI-1075 added the @inngest-admin annotation guard (strict=false, no up-to-date-before-merge), so main now fails the `main` check on every API PR that includes that file — blocking the whole residue. Resolving within mandate: landing the 1-line annotation (event-profile, matching account-deletion sibling) via #1593 FIRST as the fix vehicle; other PRs clear on their next main-merge. No action needed from you; flagging because main is red right now and your own merges will hit it until #1593 lands.

Resolved your scope caveat: corrected annotation from event-profile to no-db. Verified scripts/check-inngest-admin.ts (VALID_SCOPES incl no-db = no DB access) and the service services/billing/store-teardown.ts — Stripe + RevenueCat external APIs only, zero DB access. no-db is the accurate token. #1593 lands it; #1132 told to drop its event-profile dup and take main.

Took your throughput advisory (inb-6): cut a STANDALONE 1-line no-db hotfix PR (b-hotfix, branch inngest-no-db-hotfix) instead of bundling the unblock into #1593. Merging it FIRST ahead of all residue. #1593 reverted to a clean schema-rename PR (b-1087 dropping the annotation). Resolves pr-cleanup-1/2 vehicle choice.

resolved: hotfix #1654 (no-db annotation) merged to main, squash 411803de. Ambient main red cleared; whole residue can now re-merge main and pass the `main` check. Note: #1603 (b-1165) had independently added the same annotation with the WRONG token (event-profile — implies DB ops, but the fn has zero DB access); told it to drop its line and take main no-db, keeping its real onFailure work.
